---
title: "Talks"
toc: false
---

<div class="card-item">

### Machine learning-assisted global life cycle assessment reveals long-term biochar-crop design strategies for climate-smart agriculture

<div class="meta">July 2025 · International Conference on Industrial Ecology (ISIE), Singapore</div>

</div>

<div class="card-item">

### Understanding crop dynamics in Kenya with Machine Learning

<div class="meta">Aug 2024 · Climate Change AI (CCAI) Summer School, Montreal, Canada</div>
[PDF Slides](files/slides/crop_kenya.pdf){.link-btn target="_blank"}
</div>

<div class="card-item">

### Sustainable Circular Bioeconomy as Climate Change Mitigation - U.S. Biochar System Study

<div class="meta">Oct 2023 · INFORMS Annual Meetings, Arizona, U.S.A.</div>

</div>

<div class="card-item">

### Generating Life Cycle Inventory for Industrial Systems in (Developing) Countries with Graph Neural Network: A Case Study on Electricity Production

<div class="meta">June 2023 · International Conference on Industrial Ecology (ISIE), Leiden, Netherlands</div>

</div>

<div class="card-item">

### Introduction to Machine Learning (1 hour)

<div class="meta">Nov 11, 2022 · Yale University</div>

[PDF Slides](files/slides/intro-to-ml.pdf){.link-btn target="_blank"}
</div>

<div class="card-item">

### Characterization and adsorption potential of Lignosulfonate-based activated carbon fibers

<div class="meta">Oct 18–19, 2018 · National Taiwan University</div>

[Slides](files/slides/2018ForestryMeeting.pdf){.link-btn target="_blank"}
</div>
